name: Void Sols
short_description: Abstract ruins. Hostile shapes. No escape but forward... Death isn’t the end as you know it. Here, it’s how you grow! Each defeat teaches you more as you rise again to defeat foes with stolen blades and bows. Pushing through a broken world warped by cruelty and shadows. Welcome. This is Void Sols.
detailed_description:
A sprawling, labyrinth stretches out ahead, steeped in shadow. Foes lurk behind every corner, but only through combat and perseverance can you endure. Death is but a lesson, you have no choice but to try again. And again. And again.

Explore a hand-crafted world and master how to take down formidable bosses in the minimalist souls-like you've been looking for! On your quest to liberate an enslaved world, you will face off against sword-wielding grunts, arrow-flinging fiends, and brutal bosses that will test your strength and skill.

REFINE AND UNLEASH YOUR BUILD

Gain Sols by defeating enemies and exploring a world filled with challenges. Bonfires offer some relief in this unforgiving world, and allow you to tailor and refine your build using your gathered Sols. Equip new weapons, alter your stats, and adapt to the challenges ahead. Just be sure to reclaim your Sols whenever you’re bested by a foe…

EXPLORE A HAND-CRAFTED WORLD TEEMING WITH SECRETS

Venture into this abstract fantasy and discover secrets of the world. Explore different biomes and illuminate every corner to find rare items, secret paths, and the truth behind a world plunged into darkness.

FACE FORMIDABLE FOES

In Void Sols, every fight is a lesson, and you must master your weapons, skills and movement to take down challenging foes. Turn the tides in your favour by studying your enemies, exploiting their weaknesses, and using their own traps against them. Gain allies, watch for attack patterns, and perfect your timing in combat as you navigate this harsh land.

FORGE YOUR EXPERIENCE

Void Sols is the perfect distillation of the souls-like genre. With a range of difficulty sliders, you can either ease your way into its unforgiving world as a newcomer or test your mettle against relentless challenges that will push even souls-like veterans to their limits.

WARNING

This game contains certain light patterns and flashing lights that could trigger or cause discomfort for people with photosensitive epilepsy or other photosensitive conditions.

If you experience dizziness, altered vision, eye or muscle twitches, loss of awareness, disorientation, any involuntary movement, or convulsions while playing, please immediately discontinue playing Void Sols and consult your doctor.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
